name: Pink Blossom Pendant
fullDesc: The Pink Blossom necklace is crafted from premium stainless steel, ensuring durability and a polished shine that lasts. Featuring a delicate pink enamel flower pendant, this elegant piece combines modern minimalism with a touch of feminine charm. Perfect for casual or formal wear, it adds a subtle, stylish accent to any outfit. Lightweight and comfortable, it’s a must-have accessory for everyday elegance

name: Butterfly charm Earring
fullDesc: Add a vibrant touch to your look with Butterfly Charm earrings by Trueluv. These stunning stud earrings feature a beautifully detailed butterfly design in a mix of purple, yellow, and pink enamel, paired with a sparkling crystal accent for an elegant finish. Made from high-quality, lightweight alloy, these earrings are comfortable for daily wear and durable for long-lasting use. Perfect for casual outings, parties, or gifting, the Butterfly Charm earrings combine playful style with sophisticated craftsmanship.

name: Butterfly Charm
fullDesc: Elegant Butterfly Charm earrings crafted with high-quality enamel and gold-plated metal. Available in 6 vibrant colors—Blue, Red, Pink, Yellow, Green, and White—these lightweight earrings feature a delicate butterfly design with a sparkling cubic zirconia stud, perfect for adding a playful yet chic touch to any outfit. Ideal for daily wear or special occasions, these earrings combine style, comfort, and versatility.

name: Color Drop
fullDesc: Add a pop of color to your look with the Color Drop earrings. Crafted from high-quality silver-plated metal, these lightweight hoop earrings feature a smooth, glossy resin charm available in five vibrant shades: Yellow, Purple, Black, Pink, and Light Blue. Perfect for daily wear or special occasions, they bring a fun, stylish, and versatile touch to any outfit. Durable, comfortable, and eye-catching, the Color Drop earrings are a must-have accessory for fashion enthusiasts.

name: Floral Jhumka
fullDesc:
Product Overview:
Add a splash of color to your ethnic wardrobe with these stunning multicolor Jhumka earrings. Combining traditional Indian craftsmanship with a playful, modern palette, these earrings are designed to make a statement at weddings, festivals, or special celebrations.

Key Features:

Style:
Traditional Jhumka silhouette featuring a delicate floral stud and a classic bell-shaped drop.

Material:
Crafted from a high-quality silver-toned alloy base decorated with vibrant enamel work and shimmering crystals.

Detailing:
Features intricate cut-out patterns on the bell, accented with colorful teardrop stones and matching hanging beads for a rhythmic sway.

Occasion:
Perfect for pairing with sarees, lehengas, or anarkalis to add a festive and youthful touch to your look.

name: Trueluv Sparkle Trio
fullDesc:
Shine bright with the Trueluv Sparkle Trio, a stunning collection of premium stud and drop earrings! 💎✨
Featuring elegant designs like rose-gold hearts, opal-style squares, and shimmering crystals.
Lightweight, stylish, and crafted to add instant glamour to any outfit.
Perfect for casual brunches, parties, and elegant evening looks. 💖✨

name: Magic Gloss
fullDesc:
Product Overview:
Get ready to glow with our Magic Lip Gloss, a must-have for anyone who loves a high-shine, ethereal look. Encased in a unique, avant-garde triangular bottle, this gloss isn't just a beauty product—it's a vanity statement.

Key Features:

Style:
Modern and playful "Magic Your Life" theme with a stunning shimmering pink finish.

Packaging:
Features a distinctive triangular glass-like bottle with a matching soft pink square cap, designed for the trend-conscious user.

Effect:
Infused with fine holographic micro-shimmer that catches the light from every angle, creating a fuller, multidimensional lip look.

Occasion:
Perfect for daily wear to add a touch of sparkle or as a top-coat over your favorite lipstick for a party-ready transformation.

name: Maroon Liquid Sindoor
fullDesc:
Product Overview:
Embrace tradition with this convenient Liquid Kumkum Stick. Designed for the modern woman who values heritage, this deep maroon bindi liquid provides a smooth, precise application for daily rituals, festivals, or weddings.

Key Features:

Style:
Classic Maroon (Sindoor/Kumkum) shade that offers a rich, matte finish suitable for all skin tones.

Packaging:
Comes in a sleek, travel-friendly pen-style applicator with a white cap, ensuring no-mess handling and easy storage in your makeup kit.

Formula:
The "Roop Lady" brand liquid is formulated for long-lasting wear, resisting smudges throughout the day.

Application:
Features a pointed tip for creating perfect, traditional round bindis or precise decorative lines with ease.

name: Cemera Ice-Matte Eyeliner
fullDesc:
Enhance your eyes with the Cemera Super Ice-Matte Eyeliner. Designed for a professional finish, this liner delivers an intense black pigment that stays perfect for 24 hours. Its lightweight, smudge-proof formula ensures a comfortable, all-day wear without fading. Whether it’s rain or sweat, the 100% waterproof technology keeps your look sharp and bold.

Finish: Ultra-Matte & Bold Black.

Specialty: Smudge-proof & Transfer-proof.

Best For: Daily wear, parties, and professional makeup.

name: Denley Luxe Lacquer
desc: Get 4 Premium long-wear glossy nail colors. ✨
fullDesc:
Upgrade your manicure game with Denley1 Premium Nail Enamels. 💅✨
Delivers salon-like shine with rich pigmentation and a smooth, streak-free finish.
From elegant nudes to bold statement shades for every mood.
Quick-dry, chip-resistant formula keeps nails fresh and flawless for days. 🌸💖

✨ High-Gloss Finish – Salon-style shine
🎨 Rich Pigmentation – Bold color in one to two coats
⏳ Long-Lasting Wear – Chip-resistant formula
🖌️ Smooth Brush Application – Even, streak-free coverage
⚡ Quick Dry Formula – No long waiting time

name: Velvet Matte Gloss
fullDesc:
Unlock your perfect pout with the HudaColor 24hr Matte Lip Gloss Set! ✨
Heart-lock design with a smooth, lightweight velvet matte finish.
Highly pigmented shades from soft pinks to bold berry tones.
Long-lasting, non-drying formula for all-day flawless lips. 💄💖

name: Magic Glow Balm
fullDesc:
Keep your smile soft and radiant with our Magic Lip Care Duo! ✨
Includes Pink Magic color-changing balm and Hot Lips hydrating stick.
Deeply moisturizes while adding a natural, healthy glow.
Perfect for daily lip care and protection from dryness. 💖💄

name: Trueluv Hot Lips
desc: Hydrating Colorful Care for Soft Lips ✨
fullDesc:
Experience the perfect blend of style and lip care with the Trueluv Hot Lips Collection. 🌈
Each balm is expertly formulated to provide long-lasting moisture while adding a subtle, healthy glow to your smile.
Whether you're looking for a pop of color or deep hydration, these pocket-sized essentials are designed for the modern lifestyle.
Keep your lips smooth, supple, and "hot" all day long! 💋✨

Key Features:

🌿 Intense Hydration: Locks in moisture for hours.
🎨 Vibrant Variety: Available in six stunning shades.
👜 Travel Friendly: Sleek design for on-the-go touch-ups.
✨ Smooth Finish: Non-sticky formula for ultimate comfort.

name: Beautyline Instant Remover
fullDesc:
Upgrade your manicure routine with the Beautyline Nail Polish Remover Wipes Trio. 🌟
This bundle features three refreshing fragrances: soothing Lavender, tropical Pineapple, and elegant Rose.
Each compact container includes 30 pre-moistened, acetone-free wipes that gently remove nail polish while nourishing cuticles.
One powerful wipe is enough to clean all ten nails, making it perfect for quick touch-ups at home or on the go. ✨🥥

Key Features:

🌸 Aromatic Variety: Includes Lavender, Pineapple, and Rose scents.
💧 Acetone-Free: Gentle on nails and skin to prevent drying.
⚡ One-Wipe Wonder: Cleans up to 10 nails with a single wipe.
👜 Travel-Ready: Spill-proof containers fit easily in any bag.
💅 30 Wipes Per Pack: Long-lasting value for multiple manicures.

name: Trueluv Teddy Matte
desc: Cute keychain with velvet matte lipstick. 💄
fullDesc:
Unveil the cutest secret in your makeup bag with the Trueluv Teddy Keychain Matte Lipstick. 🧸
This unique 2-in-1 beauty accessory features an adorable teddy bear design that doubles as a stylish keychain for your bags or keys.
Inside, you’ll find a high-pigment, velvety matte lipstick that glides on smoothly for a lightweight, long-lasting finish.
Perfect for quick touch-ups on the go, it blends convenience with chic style. Stay bold and beautiful wherever you are! 💋✨

Key Features:

🧸 Adorable Design: Stylish teddy bear keychain charm.
💄 Velvet Matte Finish: Intense color with a comfortable, non-drying feel.
🕒 Long-Lasting Wear: Stays put through your busy day.
👜 Ultimate Portability: Easily clips onto purses, backpacks, or keys.
🎁 Perfect Gift: A delightful surprise for makeup and accessory lovers.

name: H&N 36H Eyeliner
fullDesc:
Define your eyes with professional precision using the H&N Precision Liquid Eyeliner. 👁️
Features a 36-hour long-wear, waterproof and smudge-proof formula for all-day perfection.
The fine-tip applicator ensures smooth, controlled application for subtle lines or bold wings.
Delivers an intense deep-black finish that stays flawless day and night. 🖤✨

name: HudaBeauty POP Kajal
fullDesc:
Make a bold statement with the HudaBeauty POP Ultra Kajal. 👁️‍🗨️
Powered by Blink It technology, it is quick-drying, waterproof, and smudge-free for up to 12 hours.
The ultra-black, silky-smooth formula delivers intense definition for a dramatic, professional finish.
Perfect for modern lifestyles that demand long-lasting performance. ⚡🔥

name: Glamour Electric Eyeliner
desc: Precise liquid liner for bold eyes.
fullDesc:
Achieve an eye-in-bloom look with the Glamour Electric Liquid Eyeliner. 👁️
The sleek pen design allows effortless application with sharp, precise lines.
Its smooth-flowing formula delivers rich, consistent color for a professional finish.
Perfect for enhancing your natural eye beauty with ease. ✨🖋️

name: Premium Liquid Sindoor
fullDesc:
Celebrate tradition with our Premium Liquid Sindoor Set. ❤️
Features a rich, deep red pigment with a smooth liquid formula.
Precise applicator ensures a clean, flawless finish.
Smudge-proof and water-resistant for all-day wear. ✨📿

name: Shimmer Bow Headband
fullDesc:
Add a touch of fairy-tale magic to your little one's hairstyle with this exquisite Shimmer Bow Hair Clip. Designed for a dreamy look, this oversized bow is crafted from sparkling sheer organza fabric that catches the light beautifully.

Key Features:
Material: High-quality shimmering net/organza fabric with a soft glitter finish.
Design: Features elegant, long satin ribbon tails paired with delicate strands of cascading faux pearls for a princess-like effect.
Comfort & Grip: Attached to a sturdy, non-slip metal alligator clip that holds fine hair securely without pulling.
Style: Perfect for parties, weddings, birthdays, and festive occasions.
Colors: Available in vibrant Red, soft Blush Pink, and classic Gold.

name: Crystal Headband
fullDesc:
This stylish Navy Blue Headband is specially designed for special occasions, adding an elegant and luxurious touch to any outfit.

Material:
Crafted with a premium satin ribbon base, the headband features a shiny holographic fabric bow that reflects light beautifully and changes colors for a dazzling effect.

Design:
The bow is adorned with a large diamond/crystal stone at the center, complemented by delicate hanging pearl strands underneath, giving it a rich and graceful appearance.

Style & Comfort:
Designed as a comfortable hairband (not a clip), it fits securely on a child’s head and holds hair gently without causing discomfort.

Occasion:
Perfect for parties, weddings, and birthday celebrations. It pairs beautifully with blue or white dresses for a charming and elegant look.

name: Korean Matte Hair Clutch
fullDesc:
Elevate your everyday look with this set of trendy Korean-style hair accessories that blend minimalism with unique shapes.

Material:
Made from a premium matte-finish durable plastic that provides a smooth, non-slip grip without tugging on hair.

Style & Design:
The collection features aesthetic geometric shapes, including a hollow heart design, a wavy squiggle pattern, and a classic butterfly claw with heart accents.

Color Palette:
Comes in a sophisticated neutral palette featuring matte black, cool beige, and soft cream tones to match any outfit.

Functionality:
Equipped with a strong metal spring for a secure hold, making them perfect for half-up hairstyles or securing buns for both thin and thick hair.

Occasion:
Ideal for casual daily wear, office settings, or as a chic addition to a brunch outfit

name: Floral Hair-Clip Set
fullDesc:
Brighten up any hairstyle with this vibrant set of Korean-inspired mini hair clips, designed to be both functional and fun.

Material:
Crafted from high-quality metallic-finish plastic with a glossy coating that gives each clip a premium, shiny look.

Style & Design:
The set features two adorable themes—sparkling strawberries with textured details and vibrant flowers with a shimmering crystal-like center.

Color Palette:
Includes a diverse range of multicolored shades, such as emerald green, royal blue, ruby red, metallic gold, and bright purple, allowing for endless mixing and matching.

Functionality:
Designed as small jaw-style clips with a sturdy spring mechanism, perfect for holding back small sections of hair or decorating braids and pigtails.

Occasion:
Ideal for school, parties, festive events, or simply adding a pop of color to a casual day out.

name: Heart Shape Korean Clutch
fullDesc:
Elevate your daily look with these Korean-style heart-shaped hair claw clips. Designed for both functionality and aesthetic appeal, these clips offer a modern twist on a classic accessory, perfect for achieving that effortless "clean girl" or "soft girl" aesthetic.

Key Features:

Style:
Minimalist Korean design featuring an open-heart silhouette with a smooth matte finish.

Material:
Made from high-quality, durable acrylic/polycarbonate with a sturdy metal spring for a secure, non-slip grip.

Versatility:
The set includes timeless Black and Cream/Off-White shades, making them easy to pair with any outfit, from casual loungewear to elegant dresses.

Hair Type:
Suitable for various hair thicknesses; ideal for half-up styles or securing buns.

name: Luxe Satin Scrunchies
fullDesc:
Say goodbye to hair breakage and hello to effortless style with our Premium Satin Scrunchie Collection! ✨ These ultra-soft accessories are designed to glide over your hair without pulling or snagging, keeping your locks smooth and frizz-free all day long. 🎀

Featuring a stunning palette of rich jewel tones and classic neutrals—including deep navy, elegant champagne, and shimmering gold—these scrunchies add a touch of sophistication to any hairstyle. 🌟

Whether you're rocking a messy bun or a sleek ponytail, our high-quality elastic ensures a secure yet comfortable grip.

Treat your hair to the luxury it deserves! 💖👑🍂

name: Kawaii Teddy Clips
desc: Adorable bear clips for little stars.
fullDesc:
Add a touch of magic to her day with these Premium Teddy Bear Hair Clips! 🧸✨ This charming set of pink and purple clips is perfect for keeping hair in place while looking absolutely precious. 🌸

Designed with a secure yet comfortable grip, they are the ideal accessory for school, parties, or everyday fun. 🎀

Make every hairstyle special with these lovable little companions! 💖🍭🌈

name: Matte Pastel Hairbands
desc: Get 4 Chic matte finish pastel hairbands. .
fullDesc:
Add a sophisticated touch to your hairstyle with the Trueluv Matte Pastel Hairbands. 🎀
These headbands feature a premium matte finish and a unique scalloped edge design for a modern, minimalist look.
Available in soft pastel shades like lavender, mint, and peach, they offer a comfortable, non-pinching fit.
Perfect for work, school, or casual outings to keep your hair neat and stylish! ✨☁️

name: Artificial Jasmine Gajra
desc: Get 2 Elegant jasmine hair accessory piece. .
fullDesc:
Enhance your traditional look with our Exquisite Artificial Jasmine Gajra. 🌸
Handcrafted to mimic the beauty of fresh flowers, this stunning hair accessory features classic white jasmine blossoms accented with vibrant red and yellow rose highlights.
It is lightweight, durable, and designed to stay secure in your bun or braid all day long.
Perfect for weddings, festivals, or any special occasion where you want to add a touch of timeless grace to your hairstyle! 🏹💖

name: Matte ZigZag Claws
desc: Get 2 Trendy matte finish hair claw clips
fullDesc:
Elevate your hair game with these stylish Matte ZigZag Hair Claw Clips! 🧷✨
These trendy clips feature a unique zigzag design with a matte finish that adds a modern twist to any hairstyle.
They are easy to use and provide a secure hold without damaging your hair.
Perfect for adding a touch of flair to your everyday look or special occasions! 💫

name: Lavender Sparkle
fullDesc:
Product Overview:
Add a touch of timeless sophistication to your hand with this exquisite lavender-hued gemstone ring. Designed for elegance and precision, this piece captures the essence of refined beauty, making it an ideal choice for engagements, anniversaries, or a luxury gift for yourself.

Key Features:
Style: A classic three-stone setting featuring a prominent round-cut center stone flanked by delicate side accents.
Material: Crafted from high-quality polished sterling silver or white gold, ensuring a brilliant shine that complements the cool tones of the gemstone.
Detailing: The center features a vibrant lavender-violet stone (resembling Tanzanite or Amethyst), securely held by a four-prong setting and highlighted by shimmering clear accent crystals for added brilliance.
Occasion: Its dainty and slender band makes it perfect for stacking with other rings or wearing alone as a subtle statement piece for formal events or everyday luxury.
